name: perso-ai
description: Perso AI agent plugins — AI dubbing (video voice translation with lip-sync & audio separation) and SRT subtitle extraction & translation.

plugins.name: perso-dubbing
plugins.description: Auto-dub videos into other languages with lip-sync (Perso AI Dubbing), plus voice/background audio separation and SRT subtitle extraction & translation (/srt). Single files, folders, URLs, auto split & merge for long media, multi-language output, resume.
